Off Calendar Jul-09-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MORGAN E. LEWIS, Esq. of Cooley LLP (Tel: 415-693-2000) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF EDWARD WESTERMAN's Motion To Seal.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to seal is granted.

Order signed.
